'''jakotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoacromion|pseudoacromion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoacromion|pseudoacromion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jakotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæketheth|jæketheth]] || [[word:jækethej|jækethej]] || [[word:jækethesh|jækethesh]] || [[word:jækethe|jækethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jakokothoth|jakokothoth]] || [[word:jakokothoj|jakokothoj]] || [[word:jakokothosh|jakokothosh]] || [[word:jakokotho|jakokotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jakothoth|jakothoth]] || [[word:jakothoj|jakothoj]] || [[word:jakothosh|jakothosh]] || [[word:jakotho|jakotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jakofthoth|jakofthoth]] || [[word:jakofthoj|jakofthoj]] || [[word:jakofthosh|jakofthosh]] || [[word:jakofthof|jakofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jakothotho|jakothotho]] || [[word:jakothojo|jakothojo]] || [[word:jakothosho|jakothosho]] || [[word:jakothoko|jakothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jakothoth|jakothoth]] || [[word:jakothoj|jakothoj]] || [[word:jakothosh|jakothosh]] || [[word:jakotho|jakotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jakothothol|jakothothol]] || [[word:jakothojol|jakothojol]] || [[word:jakothoshol|jakothoshol]] || [[word:jakothokol|jakothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jakothothotho|jakothothotho]] || [[word:jakothojojo|jakothojojo]] || [[word:jakothoshosho|jakothoshosho]] || [[word:jakothoko|jakothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jakothothon|jakothothon]] || [[word:jakothojon|jakothojon]] || [[word:jakothoshon|jakothoshon]] || [[word:jakothokon|jakothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jakothothoro|jakothothoro]] || [[word:jakothojoro|jakothojoro]] || [[word:jakothoshoro|jakothoshoro]] || [[word:jakothokoro|jakothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
